description: A store manager decides to create a one-day 'manager's special' on a specific item to clear out slow-moving stock.

nodes.task_description: Open the promotions module in the store management system.

expected_outcome.value: The manager accesses the promotion creation tool.

nodes.task_description: Create a new promotion, define it as a percentage discount (e.g., 30% off), and link it to the specific item number.

expected_outcome.value: The promotion details are entered correctly.

nodes.task_description: Set the promotion to be active for today only and activate it.

expected_outcome.value: The temporary promotion is now live in the POS system.
